description: The SettingActionProxy component is used to trigger an action on a subsetting under the component of type S which would be globally registered in the world.

fields.ActionName: The name of the action being triggered.
fields.SubsettingGetter: The name of the sync delegate method being triggered.
fields.SubsettingKey: The key being used to find the sub setting being triggered.

methods.Trigger: triggers the target specified by this component's values and generic typing.

usage: Used in the settings menu and only works in user space.
